title: core/pow: HEX lookup table is untyped slice with no compile-time length check
description: core/src/pow.rs: `const HEX: &[u8] = b"0123456789abcdef"` is a &[u8] slice — if a future edit accidentally shortens it, hex encoding silently panics or produces corrupt hex at runtime. Fix: change to `const HEX: [u8; 16] = *b"0123456789abcdef"` so the length is a compile-time invariant.
